heading: Waters in Louisiana Purchase as public highways
label: 10 Waters in Louisiana Purchase as public highways
text: All the navigable rivers and waters in the former Territories of Orleans and Louisiana shall be and forever remain public highways.
notes: CodificationR.S. § 5251 derived from , .act Mar. 3, 1811, ch. 46, § 122 Stat. 606
amendments: CodificationR.S. § 5251 derived from , .act Mar. 3, 1811, ch. 46, § 122 Stat. 606
